ShortDescription.Value: Change zoning on any side of a road; for new roads or updating existing roads.

Publish.LongDescription:
### Zone Tools Redux
- Change zoning along new roads or update existing roads. Enable zoning road sides for both/left/right/none. - Finer control of where buildings will spawn, as well as placing roads close together without overlapping/conflicting zones. - This is the older mod with a movable panel. If you prefer icons in a static game panel, try new Easy Zoning mod (complete redesign).
### New roads
- Open zone panel by clicking the button (top-left) or hotkey (default Shift+X) - Pre-select: both, left, right, or none (move the panel where you like). - Draw a new road (note: road draw direction influences vanilla side).
### Update Existing Roads (UER):
- Open zoning panel (top-left button or hotkey) - Enable the **Update Roads** button (recycle icon). Click again to turn off. - Select the side you want (both, left, right, none buttons). - Left click on roads to update zoning (supports click-and-drag to update many roads). - Left mouse applies the zone change. Select different icons to change. - New: right mouse click will also cycle the 4-zone options.
Power Trick: if you have existing roads and do not want a new road intersecting it to alter zoning, pick **None**, then draw the new road. Your existing road should keep zoning facing the same original direction you set.
## Options
- ✅ Protect occupied cells (buildings) - ✅ Protect zoned-but-empty cells - ✅ Contour terrain lines button - ✅ Change keybind shortcut (Options menu)
### Support and Feedback
- if mods have use, give it a Like, it's free + easy :) - Feedback to Github link, or forum, or discord.
### Tech notes
- Does not use Harmony patches; uses CS2 native systems (more compatible with the game and other mods). - Safe to remove any time. Roads keep their zoning edits so buildings don't get deleted. - Should work with Platter mod. - Contour button will not do anything if Crosswalk, or Wide Sidewalk, etc., is selected as that is not allowed in vanilla. Main goal of the contour button is to show terrain lines while updating Existing roads; as a bonus, it happens to also work in other tool modes. Contour enables what is safe to do without overriding the game's vanilla system (e.g avoids Harmony patch).
### 11 Languages
- English, Français French, Deutsch German, Español Spanish, Italiano Italian - 한국어 Korean, 日本語 Japanese, 简体中文 Simplified Chinese - 繁體中文 Traditional Chinese, Português Brasil, Polski Polish
### Credits
- River-mochi current author and maintainer - thanks to zeeshanabid94 for original ZoningToolKit (retired) - yenyang for technical support - =Noel= for Chinese locale review
Publish.ChangeLog: Major upgrade - adds hover highlight/ change indication (blue outline on road). - moved default panel location to bottom right. - added contour terrain button to the ZT panel (convenience). - sync contour toggle with vanilla Road Tools Topography. - updated languages and images. - removed option to auto open/close the Zone Tools panel when the New Roads panel opens. - improved compatibility with other mods. - added vanilla game sound effects.
